titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Lucy Kroll Papers Relating to Lynn Riggs
Kroll (Lucy) Papers Relating to Lynn Riggs
titlestmt.author: Beinecke Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 11846620.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday April 24, 2018 at 23:12

did.unittitle: Lucy Kroll papers relating to Lynn Riggs

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: The collection includes typescripts of Lynn Riggs's scripts and other writings; correspondence and subject files regarding Lynn Riggs and other Lucy Kroll Agency business associates and activities; Lucy Kroll Agency contracts and agreement files; and a small number of Lynn Riggs's personal items.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Lucy Kroll Papers Relating to Lynn Riggs is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
The collection received preliminary processing at the time of acquisition. Further rehousing, and description were carried out in 2014.

The collection is comprised of material formerly classed as Uncat ZA MS 437 and Uncat ZA MS 482. Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during basic processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

bioghist.head: Lucy Kroll (1908-1997)
bioghist.p: Lucy Kroll was born in Brooklyn in 1908. She was a literary and talent agent in New York, establishing her own agency in 1947. She represented numerous writers and performing artists including the playwright Lynn Riggs. She died in 1997.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes typescripts of Lynn Riggs's scripts and other writings; correspondence and subject files regarding Lynn Riggs and other Lucy Kroll Agency business associates and activities; Lucy Kroll Agency contracts and agreement files; and a small number of Lyn Riggs's personal items.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two groups: I. May 1995 Acquisition. II. November 1995 Acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts, correspondence and subject files, contracts and agreements, and other materials relating to Lynn Riggs and other business associates and activities of the Lucy Kroll Agency.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 437

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes typescript manuscripts, and corrected and uncorrected copies of play published as Roadside .

did.unittitle: Notebook containing index of record album collection
Typed inventory of Riggs's study in Santa Fe, New Mexico
Kroll, Nathan [composer of music for] "Toward the Western Sky"
"The Perennial Secretary" [typescript] outline for a television play by Ernest Pendrell
"A Critical Introduction to the Plays of Lynn Riggs" [by] Helen Edwards
Lynn Riggs manuscripts which may be given to the custody of the Riggs family and/or the Riggs Memorial
Lucy Kroll Agency contracts and agreements
Dramatists Play Service contract with Lucy Kroll Agency and payments
Authors League [Guild] - paperback and trade books
Society of Authors' Representatives - publishing contracts

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 482

did.unittitle: Correspondence between Lynn Riggs and Ramon Naya (Enrique Gasque) and others
